articles.headline: Japan trade data shows exports in June higher than expected

Just the data in this post. I'll have more to come on this separately.

Exports to China +17.6% year/year

  • exports to U.S. +13% year/year
  • exports to EU +20.3% year/year

This article was written by Eamonn She
